LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING CONTEMPT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS IN CONTEMPT FOR REENTERING THE PROPERTY AFTER HIS LAWFUL EVICTION. DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGES TO THE UNDERLYING FINAL JUDGMENT ARE NOT PROPERLY BEFORE THE COURT. DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY FILING SUBSEQUENT TO HIS LAWFUL EVICTION CANNOT STAY THIS COURT ENFORCING ITS PRIOR ORDERS RELIEF GRANTED IN ACCORDANCE WITH C C P SECTION 1210. ATTY.
